feat.access: Tian Xia origin or follower of Nalinivati
feat.name: Form of the Beloved Mother
feat.text: You channel the blessings of Nalinivati to transform into a manifestation of her will. You can cast 5th-rank animal form as an occult innate spell once per day, but you can choose only snake form with the spell. You can spend an additional action casting *animal form* to also cast 5th-rank *slither* centered on your location; Nalinivati’s will ensures that the shadow snakes created by the spell never harm you, so you’re unaffected by the spell. If you Dismiss animal form, the effects of slither end as well.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Nagaji
traits.text: Nagaji are brawny humanoids with scaled skin and serpentine heads, many of whom serve or respect nagas.
